# Kiril Karatitsyn

> Portfolio website for a Shopify developer focused on custom themes, Online Store 2.0 migrations, storefront UX, performance optimization, and long-term support.

This site is a portfolio and content hub for Shopify development work.

Important notes:
- The same URLs can be viewed in English, Ukrainian, and German through the language switcher.
- The main high-value content is the homepage, project archive, case studies, and blog posts.
- Contact is available directly from the homepage and dedicated contact section.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://www.karatitsyn.com/): Main overview of services, featured work, experience, and contact options.
- [Projects](https://www.karatitsyn.com/projects): Full project archive and storefront work catalog.
- [Blog](https://www.karatitsyn.com/blog): Articles about Shopify development, conversion, and launch best practices.

## Featured Case Studies

- [Bazar Bizar](https://www.karatitsyn.com/projects/bazar-bizar): Shopify case study for a premium ecommerce storefront.
- [Elanora Skin](https://www.karatitsyn.com/projects/elanora-skin): Storefront work focused on UX and presentation.
- [Petaljet](https://www.karatitsyn.com/projects/petaljet): Ongoing Shopify support and technical improvement work.
- [Nimfa](https://www.karatitsyn.com/projects/nimfa): Figma to custom Shopify theme implementation.
- [Indian Affairs](https://www.karatitsyn.com/projects/indian-affairs): Custom Shopify storefront project.
- [Silk Tallow](https://www.karatitsyn.com/projects/silk-tallow): Shopify case study with brand-focused storefront execution.

## Blog Posts

- [5 quick wins to boost your Shopify conversion](https://www.karatitsyn.com/blog/shopify-conversion-boost): Practical conversion improvements for Shopify stores.
- [Landing page launch checklist for busy founders](https://www.karatitsyn.com/blog/landing-page-launch-checklist): A short launch-readiness checklist for ecommerce pages.

## Contact

- [Contact section](https://www.karatitsyn.com/#contact): Email and booking CTA for project inquiries.

## Optional

- [robots.txt](https://www.karatitsyn.com/robots.txt): Crawl directives for search engines.
- [sitemap.xml](https://www.karatitsyn.com/sitemap.xml): List of indexable public pages.
